plugins.name: ACPX Runtime
plugins.description: Embedded ACP runtime backend with plugin-owned session and transport management.

cwd.label: Default Working Directory
cwd.help: Default working directory for embedded ACP session operations when not set per session.

stateDir.label: State Directory
stateDir.help: Directory used for embedded ACP session state and persistence.

permissionMode.label: Permission Mode
permissionMode.help: Default permission policy for embedded ACP runtime prompts.

nonInteractivePermissions.label: Non-Interactive Permission Policy
nonInteractivePermissions.help: Policy when interactive permission prompts are unavailable.

pluginToolsMcpBridge.label: Plugin Tools MCP Bridge
pluginToolsMcpBridge.help: Default off. When enabled, inject the built-in OpenClaw plugin-tools MCP server into embedded ACP sessions so ACP agents can call plugin-registered tools.

strictWindowsCmdWrapper.label: Strict Windows cmd Wrapper
strictWindowsCmdWrapper.help: Legacy compatibility field. The current embedded acpx/runtime package uses its own Windows command resolution behavior. Setting this to false is accepted for compatibility and logged as ignored.

timeoutSeconds.label: Prompt Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for each embedded runtime turn. Defaults to 120 seconds so slower Gemini CLI ACP startups have room to initialize.

queueOwnerTtlSeconds.label: Queue Owner TTL Seconds
queueOwnerTtlSeconds.help: Reserved compatibility field for the older embedded ACPX queue-owner path. Accepted for compatibility and logged as ignored.

mcpServers.label: MCP Servers
mcpServers.help: Named MCP server definitions to inject into embedded ACP session bootstrap. Each entry needs a command and can include args and env.

agents.label: Agent Commands
agents.help: Optional per-agent command overrides for the embedded ACP runtime.

command.description: Command to run the MCP server

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command

env.description: Environment variables for the MCP server

plugins.name: Active Memory
plugins.description: Runs a bounded blocking memory sub-agent before eligible conversational replies and injects relevant memory into prompt context.

enabled.label: Active Memory Recall
enabled.help: Globally enable or pause Active Memory recall while keeping the plugin command available.

agents.label: Target Agents
agents.help: Explicit agent ids that may use active memory.

model.label: Memory Model
model.help: Provider/model used for the blocking memory sub-agent.

modelFallback.label: Fallback Memory Model
modelFallback.help: Optional provider/model to use if no explicit plugin model, session model, or agent primary model resolves.

modelFallbackPolicy.label: Model Fallback Policy
modelFallbackPolicy.help: Deprecated compatibility field. Active Memory no longer uses a built-in fallback model; set modelFallback explicitly if you want a fallback.

allowedChatTypes.label: Allowed Chat Types
allowedChatTypes.help: Choose which session types may run Active Memory. Defaults to direct-message style sessions only.

queryMode.label: Query Mode
queryMode.help: Choose whether the blocking memory sub-agent sees only the latest user message, a small recent tail, or the full conversation.

promptStyle.label: Prompt Style
promptStyle.help: Choose how eager or strict the blocking memory sub-agent should be when deciding whether to return memory.

thinking.label: Thinking Override
thinking.help: Advanced: optional thinking level for the blocking memory sub-agent. Defaults to off for speed.

promptOverride.label: Prompt Override
promptOverride.help: Advanced: replace the default Active Memory sub-agent instructions. Conversation context is still appended.

promptAppend.label: Prompt Append
promptAppend.help: Advanced: append extra operator instructions after the default Active Memory sub-agent instructions.

maxSummaryChars.label: Max Summary Characters
maxSummaryChars.help: Maximum total characters allowed in the active-memory summary.

logging.label: Enable Logging
logging.help: Emit active memory timing and result logs.

persistTranscripts.label: Persist Transcripts
persistTranscripts.help: Keep blocking memory sub-agent session transcripts on disk in a separate plugin-owned directory.

transcriptDir.label: Transcript Directory
transcriptDir.help: Relative directory under the agent sessions folder used when transcript persistence is enabled.

qmd.searchMode.label: QMD Search Mode
qmd.searchMode.help: Override the QMD search mode used by the blocking memory sub-agent. Defaults to fast lexical search; use inherit to match the main memory backend setting.

plugins.name: @openclaw/alibaba-provider
plugins.description: OpenClaw Alibaba Model Studio video provider plugin

discovery.label: Model Discovery
discovery.help: Plugin-owned controls for Amazon Bedrock model auto-discovery.

discovery.enabled.label: Enable Discovery
discovery.enabled.help: When false, OpenClaw keeps the Amazon Bedrock plugin available but skips implicit startup discovery. When true, discovery can run even without AWS auth env markers.

discovery.region.label: Discovery Region
discovery.region.help: AWS region to use for Bedrock model discovery. Defaults to AWS_REGION, AWS_DEFAULT_REGION, then us-east-1.

discovery.providerFilter.label: Provider Filter
discovery.providerFilter.help: Optional Bedrock provider-name allowlist for discovery, such as anthropic or amazon.

discovery.refreshInterval.label: Discovery Refresh Interval (s)
discovery.refreshInterval.help: How long to cache Bedrock discovery results in seconds. Set to 0 to disable caching.

discovery.defaultContextWindow.label: Default Context Window
discovery.defaultContextWindow.help: Fallback context window to assign to discovered Bedrock models.

discovery.defaultMaxTokens.label: Default Max Tokens
discovery.defaultMaxTokens.help: Fallback max output tokens to assign to discovered Bedrock models.

guardrail.label: Guardrail
guardrail.help: Amazon Bedrock Guardrails settings applied to Bedrock model invocations.

plugins.name: @openclaw/amazon-bedrock-mantle-provider
plugins.description: OpenClaw Amazon Bedrock Mantle (OpenAI-compatible) provider plugin

webSearch.apiKey.label: Brave Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Brave Search API key (fallback: BRAVE_API_KEY env var).

webSearch.mode.label: Brave Search Mode
webSearch.mode.help: Brave Search mode: web or llm-context.

plugins.name: @openclaw/cloudflare-ai-gateway-provider
plugins.description: OpenClaw Cloudflare AI Gateway provider plugin

plugins.name: Codex
plugins.description: Codex app-server harness and Codex-managed GPT model catalog.

discovery.label: Model Discovery
discovery.help: Plugin-owned controls for discovering Codex app-server models.

discovery.enabled.label: Enable Discovery
discovery.enabled.help: When false, OpenClaw keeps the Codex harness available but uses the bundled fallback model list.

discovery.timeoutMs.label: Discovery Timeout
discovery.timeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for Codex app-server model discovery before falling back to the bundled model list.

appServer.label: App Server
appServer.help: Runtime controls for connecting to Codex app-server.

appServer.transport.label: Transport
appServer.transport.help: Use stdio to spawn Codex locally, or websocket to connect to an already-running app-server.

appServer.args.label: Arguments
appServer.args.help: Arguments used for stdio transport. Defaults to app-server --listen stdio://.

appServer.url.label: WebSocket URL
appServer.url.help: Codex app-server WebSocket URL when transport is websocket.

appServer.authToken.label: Auth Token
appServer.authToken.help: Bearer token sent to the WebSocket app-server.

appServer.headers.label: Headers
appServer.headers.help: Additional headers sent to the WebSocket app-server.

appServer.requestTimeoutMs.label: Request Timeout
appServer.requestTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for Codex app-server control-plane requests.

appServer.approvalPolicy.label: Approval Policy
appServer.approvalPolicy.help: Codex native approval policy sent to thread start, resume, and turns.

appServer.sandbox.label: Sandbox
appServer.sandbox.help: Codex native sandbox mode sent to thread start and resume.

appServer.approvalsReviewer.label: Approvals Reviewer
appServer.approvalsReviewer.help: Use user approvals or the Codex guardian subagent for native app-server approvals.

appServer.serviceTier.label: Service Tier
appServer.serviceTier.help: Optional Codex service tier passed when starting or resuming threads.

plugins.name: Device Pairing
plugins.description: Generate setup codes and approve device pairing requests.

publicUrl.label: Gateway URL
publicUrl.help: Public WebSocket URL used for /pair setup codes (ws/wss or http/https).

plugins.name: Diffs
plugins.description: Read-only diff viewer and file renderer for agents.

viewerBaseUrl.label: Viewer Base URL
viewerBaseUrl.help: Persistent gateway base URL used for returned viewer links when a tool call does not pass baseUrl.

defaults.fontFamily.label: Default Font
defaults.fontFamily.help: Preferred font family name for diff content and headers.

defaults.fontSize.label: Default Font Size
defaults.fontSize.help: Base diff font size in pixels.

defaults.lineSpacing.label: Default Line Spacing
defaults.lineSpacing.help: Line-height multiplier applied to diff rows.

defaults.layout.label: Default Layout
defaults.layout.help: Initial diff layout shown in the viewer.

defaults.background.label: Default Background Highlights
defaults.background.help: Show added/removed background highlights by default.

defaults.fileFormat.label: Default File Format
defaults.fileFormat.help: Rendered file format for file mode (PNG or PDF).

defaults.fileScale.label: Default File Scale
defaults.fileScale.help: Device scale factor used while rendering file artifacts.

defaults.fileMaxWidth.label: Default File Max Width
defaults.fileMaxWidth.help: Maximum file render width in CSS pixels.

defaults.mode.label: Default Output Mode
defaults.mode.help: Tool default when mode is omitted. Use view for canvas/gateway viewer, file for PNG/PDF, or both.

security.allowRemoteViewer.label: Allow Remote Viewer
security.allowRemoteViewer.help: Allow non-loopback access to diff viewer URLs when the token path is known.

webSearch.region.label: DuckDuckGo Region
webSearch.region.help: Optional DuckDuckGo region code such as us-en, uk-en, or de-de.

webSearch.apiKey.label: Exa API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Exa Search API key (fallback: EXA_API_KEY env var).

plugins.name: @openclaw/feishu
plugins.description: OpenClaw Feishu/Lark channel plugin (community maintained by @m1heng)

webSearch.apiKey.label: Firecrawl Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Firecrawl API key for web search (fallback: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY env var).

webFetch.apiKey.label: Firecrawl Fetch API Key
webFetch.apiKey.help: Firecrawl API key for web fetch fallback (fallback: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY env var).

discovery.label: Model Discovery
discovery.help: Plugin-owned controls for GitHub Copilot model auto-discovery.

discovery.enabled.label: Enable Discovery
discovery.enabled.help: When false, OpenClaw keeps the GitHub Copilot plugin available but skips implicit startup discovery from ambient Copilot credentials.

webSearch.apiKey.label: Gemini Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Gemini API key for Google Search grounding (fallback: GEMINI_API_KEY env var).

webSearch.model.label: Gemini Search Model
webSearch.model.help: Gemini model override for web search grounding.

discovery.label: Model Discovery
discovery.help: Plugin-owned controls for Hugging Face model auto-discovery.

discovery.enabled.label: Enable Discovery
discovery.enabled.help: When false, OpenClaw keeps the Hugging Face plugin available but skips implicit startup discovery from ambient Hugging Face credentials.

plugins.name: LLM Task
plugins.description: Generic JSON-only LLM tool for structured tasks callable from workflows.

allowedModels.description: Allowlist of provider/model keys like openai-codex/gpt-5.2.

plugins.name: Lobster
plugins.description: Typed workflow tool with resumable approvals.

dreaming.frequency.label: Dreaming Frequency
dreaming.frequency.help: Optional cron cadence for the full dreaming sweep (light, REM, then deep).

plugins.name: @openclaw/memory-lancedb
plugins.description: OpenClaw LanceDB-backed long-term memory plugin with auto-recall/capture

embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY})

embedding.baseUrl.label: Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: Base URL for compatible providers (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1)

embedding.dimensions.label: Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Vector dimensions for custom models (required for non-standard models)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

dreaming.label: Dreaming
dreaming.help: Optional dreaming config consumed when this plugin owns the memory slot

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture

storageOptions.label: Storage Options
storageOptions.help: Storage configuration options (access_key, secret_key, endpoint, etc.); supports ${ENV_VAR} values

plugins.name: Memory Wiki
plugins.description: Persistent wiki compiler and Obsidian-friendly knowledge vault for OpenClaw.

vaultMode.label: Vault Mode
vaultMode.help: Choose isolated, bridge, or unsafe-local mode for the wiki vault.

vault.path.label: Vault Path
vault.path.help: Filesystem path for the wiki vault root.

vault.renderMode.label: Render Mode
vault.renderMode.help: Render markdown in native OpenClaw format or Obsidian-friendly format.

obsidian.useOfficialCli.label: Use Obsidian CLI
obsidian.useOfficialCli.help: Probe and use the official Obsidian CLI when available.

bridge.enabled.label: Enable Bridge Mode
bridge.enabled.help: Read public memory artifacts and events from the active memory plugin in bridge mode.

bridge.readMemoryArtifacts.label: Read Memory Artifacts
bridge.readMemoryArtifacts.help: Enable bridge reads from the active memory plugin's public artifact export.

unsafeLocal.allowPrivateMemoryCoreAccess.label: Allow Private Memory Access
unsafeLocal.allowPrivateMemoryCoreAccess.help: Experimental same-repo escape hatch for reading memory-core private paths.

context.includeCompiledDigestPrompt.label: Include Compiled Digest In Prompt
context.includeCompiledDigestPrompt.help: Append a compact compiled wiki digest snapshot to memory prompt sections for context engines and legacy prompt assembly.

plugins.name: @openclaw/minimax-provider
plugins.description: OpenClaw MiniMax provider and OAuth plugin

webSearch.apiKey.label: MiniMax Coding Plan key
webSearch.apiKey.help: MiniMax Coding Plan key (fallback: MINIMAX_CODE_PLAN_KEY, MINIMAX_CODING_API_KEY, or MINIMAX_API_KEY if it already points at a coding-plan token).

webSearch.region.label: MiniMax Search Region
webSearch.region.help: Search endpoint region override. Leave unset to reuse your configured MiniMax host or MINIMAX_API_HOST.

webSearch.apiKey.label: Kimi Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Moonshot/Kimi API key (fallback: KIMI_API_KEY or MOONSHOT_API_KEY env var).

plugins.name: @openclaw/nostr
plugins.description: OpenClaw Nostr channel plugin for NIP-04 encrypted DMs

discovery.label: Model Discovery
discovery.help: Plugin-owned controls for Ollama model auto-discovery.

discovery.enabled.label: Enable Discovery
discovery.enabled.help: When false, OpenClaw keeps the Ollama plugin available but skips implicit startup discovery of ambient local or remote Ollama models.

plugins.name: OpenProse
plugins.description: OpenProse VM skill pack with a /prose slash command.

personality.description: Controls the default OpenAI-specific personality used for OpenAI and OpenAI Codex runs. `friendly` and `on` enable the overlay; `off` disables it.

plugins.name: OpenShell Sandbox
plugins.description: Sandbox backend powered by OpenShell with mirrored local workspaces and SSH-based command execution.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: Sandbox mode. Use mirror for the default local-workspace flow or remote for a fully remote workspace.

command.label: OpenShell Command
command.help: Path or command name for the openshell CLI.

gateway.label: Gateway Name
gateway.help: Optional OpenShell gateway name passed as --gateway.

gatewayEndpoint.label: Gateway Endpoint
gatewayEndpoint.help: Optional OpenShell gateway endpoint passed as --gateway-endpoint.

from.label: Sandbox Source
from.help: OpenShell sandbox source for first-time create. Defaults to openclaw.

policy.label: Policy File
policy.help: Optional path to a custom OpenShell sandbox policy YAML.

providers.label: Providers
providers.help: Provider names to attach when a sandbox is created.

gpu.label: GPU
gpu.help: Request GPU resources when creating the sandbox.

autoProviders.label: Auto-create Providers
autoProviders.help: When enabled, pass --auto-providers during sandbox create.

remoteWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Workspace Dir
remoteWorkspaceDir.help: Primary writable workspace inside the OpenShell sandbox.

remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Agent Dir
remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.help: Mirror path for the real agent workspace when workspaceAccess is read-only.

timeoutSeconds.label: Command Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for openshell CLI operations such as create/upload/download.

webSearch.apiKey.label: Perplexity API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Perplexity or OpenRouter API key for web search.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Perplexity Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional Perplexity/OpenRouter chat-completions base URL override.

plugins.name: Phone Control
plugins.description: Arm/disarm high-risk phone node commands (camera/screen/writes) with an optional auto-expiry.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: SearXNG Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Base URL of your SearXNG instance, such as http://localhost:8080 or https://search.example.com/searxng.

webSearch.categories.label: SearXNG Categories
webSearch.categories.help: Optional comma-separated categories such as general, news, or science.

webSearch.language.label: SearXNG Language
webSearch.language.help: Optional language code for results such as en, de, or fr.

plugins.name: @openclaw/synology-chat
plugins.description: Synology Chat channel plugin for OpenClaw

webSearch.apiKey.label: Tavily API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Tavily API key for web search and extraction (fallback: TAVILY_API_KEY env var).

plugins.name: Thread Ownership
plugins.description: Prevents multiple agents from responding in the same Slack thread. Uses HTTP calls to the slack-forwarder ownership API.

forwarderUrl.label: Forwarder URL
forwarderUrl.help: Base URL of the slack-forwarder ownership API (default: http://slack-forwarder:8750)

abTestChannels.label: A/B Test Channels
abTestChannels.help: Slack channel IDs where thread ownership is enforced

plugins.name: @openclaw/vercel-ai-gateway-provider
plugins.description: OpenClaw Vercel AI Gateway provider plugin

provider.label: Provider
provider.help: Use twilio, telnyx, or mock for dev/no-network.

streaming.provider.label: Streaming Provider
streaming.provider.help: Uses the first registered realtime transcription provider when unset.

realtime.provider.label: Realtime Voice Provider
realtime.provider.help: Uses the first registered realtime voice provider when unset.

tts.provider.label: TTS Provider Override
tts.provider.help: Deep-merges with messages.tts (Microsoft is ignored for calls).

responseModel.label: Response Model
responseModel.help: Optional override. Falls back to the runtime default model when unset.

plugins.name: Webhooks
plugins.description: Authenticated inbound webhooks that bind external automation to OpenClaw TaskFlows.

webSearch.apiKey.label: Grok Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: xAI API key for Grok web search (fallback: XAI_API_KEY env var).

webSearch.model.label: Grok Search Model
webSearch.model.help: Grok model override for web search.

webSearch.inlineCitations.label: Inline Citations
webSearch.inlineCitations.help: Include inline markdown citations in Grok responses.

codeExecution.enabled.label: Enable Code Execution
codeExecution.enabled.help: Enable the code_execution tool for remote xAI sandbox analysis.

xSearch.enabled.label: Enable X Search
xSearch.enabled.help: Enable the x_search tool for searching X posts with xAI.

xSearch.inlineCitations.label: X Search Inline Citations
xSearch.inlineCitations.help: Keep inline markdown citations from xAI in x_search responses when available.

xSearch.maxTurns.label: X Search Max Turns
xSearch.maxTurns.help: Optional max internal tool turns xAI may use per x_search request.

xSearch.timeoutSeconds.label: X Search Timeout
xSearch.timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for x_search requests.

xSearch.cacheTtlMinutes.label: X Search Cache TTL
xSearch.cacheTtlMinutes.help: Cache TTL in minutes for x_search results.

codeExecution.maxTurns.label: Code Execution Max Turns
codeExecution.maxTurns.help: Optional max internal tool turns xAI may use for code_execution.

codeExecution.timeoutSeconds.label: Code Execution Timeout
codeExecution.timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for code_execution requests.

plugins.name: @openclaw/zalouser
plugins.description: OpenClaw Zalo Personal Account plugin via native zca-js integration
